name: claude-result-speak-cat
description: Desktop pet that pops up in the bottom-right corner to deliver Claude Code notifications.

plugins.name: claude-result-speak-cat
plugins.description: A desktop pet cat that appears in the bottom-right corner with speech bubble notifications when Claude finishes. Supports WSL2, native Windows (Git Bash/MSYS2), and macOS (AppKit transparent window via PyObjC).
